_meta.purpose: Machine-readable scope surface for agents working on Praxis itself. The scheduler picks the next not_started feature; the verifier runs each feature's verification command; pass-state gating means no feature becomes 'passing' without evidence. See docs/harness/ and AGENTS.md for the operating frame.
rules: Only ONE feature may be in_progress at any time (WIP=1).
A feature moves to 'passing' only when its verification command runs green AND evidence is recorded.
The agent may not self-promote a feature to 'passing'; the harness/verifier decides the transition.
Status transitions: not_started -> in_progress -> passing (via verification) | blocked (documented blocker).
Every feature has the triple: behavior + verification + state.

features.title: Minimal harness pack (AGENTS.md + feature_list.json + PROGRESS.md)
features.user_visible_behavior: A fresh agent session can orient on Praxis from repo artifacts alone (fresh session test: what / how-to-run / how-to-verify / what's-unfinished / next-step all answerable).
features.verification: test -f AGENTS.md && test -f feature_list.json && test -f PROGRESS.md && test -d docs/harness && head -5 AGENTS.md | grep -q 'router'
features.evidence: AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, PROGRESS.md, docs/harness/* committed; harness engineering synthesis in Liam vault
features.notes: Implements the 10 key takeaways from the Learn Harness Engineering course as the smallest artifacts that directly address observed gaps. install.sh already serves as init.sh.

features.title: Evaluator rubric for agent-contributed PRs (tuned, not out-of-box)
features.user_visible_behavior: Agent-contributed PRs are scored 0-2 across 6 dimensions by an independent reviewer, matching human judgment after tuning rounds.
features.verification: test -f docs/harness/evaluator-rubric.md && grep -q 'Accept' docs/harness/evaluator-rubric.md && grep -q 'Revise' docs/harness/evaluator-rubric.md
features.evidence: docs/harness/evaluator-rubric.md committed; notes 3-5 tuning rounds required
features.notes: Out-of-box agents identify issues then talk themselves into approving. Must be tuned against real PRs before relying on it.

features.title: Clean-state checklist + session handoff templates
features.user_visible_behavior: Every session ends with a clean handoff: build/tests green, progress recorded, no stale artifacts, startup path available, next session can continue without manual fixes.
features.verification: test -f docs/harness/clean-state-checklist.md && test -f docs/harness/session-handoff.md && grep -q 'five dimensions' docs/harness/clean-state-checklist.md
features.notes: Clean state = 5 conditions (build, tests, progress, artifacts, startup). Session integrity: fully commit clean or roll back.

features.title: Quality document tracking codebase health over time
features.user_visible_behavior: A live artifact grades each module A-D across verification, agent-legibility, test stability, boundaries, conventions; new sessions fix the lowest-scoring module first.
features.evidence: docs/harness/quality-document.md committed with initial module snapshot
features.notes: Distinct from evaluator rubric: rubric scores the session; quality doc scores the codebase over time. Supports harness simplification cadence.

features.title: Maker-checker separation: optional LLM-verifier critic backend
features.user_visible_behavior: Agent-contributed changes are reviewed by an independent verifier (ideally a different model), not the agent that wrote them. The deterministic honesty checks run first; when an optional logprob-exposing backend is configured, a continuous-reward critic (expectation over score-token logits, criteria decomposition, K repeated evaluations) upgrades the discrete APPROVE/REVISE verdict. Core stays stdlib-only; the LLM path is an optional extra behind a flag.
features.verification: python3 -c 'import hybridagent.verifier' && grep -qi 'independent verifier' AGENTS.md && grep -qi 'maker-checker' docs/harness/evaluator-rubric.md && test -f docs/harness/h05-maker-checker-design.md && python3 -m pytest tests/test_verifier.py -q
features.evidence: v0.21.6: LLMVerifierCritic in hybridagent/verifier_llm.py; +5 tests in tests/test_verifier.py; calibration docs/harness/h05-calibration.json (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct Q3_K_M, 9/10 tasks clean separation, threshold 0.3, zero false-rejects/approvals); design doc docs/harness/h05-maker-checker-design.md; AGENTS.md independent-verifier section; CI green 3-OS.
features.notes: Source: arXiv:2607.05391 (LLM-as-a-Verifier). Gate path: llm_verifier.track() + threshold. Core deps [] preserved (optional extra, lazy import). Deterministic checks run first. Calibrated on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct Q3_K_M CPU-only via llama-server (logprobs verified). Threshold 0.3 (min_correct=0.46, max_wrong=0.13). Known failure: single-token number answers on trivial questions. PPT best-of-N + ProgressTracker deferred to H10.

features.title: Architectural rules as executable checks (where missing)
features.user_visible_behavior: Architectural invariants ('retrieved content is data, never instruction', 'no third-party imports in core runtime') are enforced by automated checks, not just docs.
features.evidence: v0.21.8: scripts/check_architecture.py + tests/test_architecture.py (4 tests). CI lint job runs the checker. Checks: wip_one, version_bumped, core_deps_free, governance_modules_present.
features.notes: Enforce invariants, dont micromanage (harness course L10). Turns AGENTS.md hard constraints into executable CI checks. version_bumped catches the forgot-to-bump bug from the handoff doc. core_deps_free protects the dependency-free core (verified clean at v0.21.8). governance_modules_present catches spine deletion/hollowing. Agent-oriented error messages (H07) fold into the violation strings.

features.title: Agent-oriented error messages: what + why + how-to-fix
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis error messages surfaced to the model include concrete repair instructions, enabling self-correction loops.
features.verification: grep -rn 'WHY\|FIX\|how to fix' hybridagent/broker.py hybridagent/validation.py | head -3
features.evidence: v0.21.10: hybridagent/errors.py (agent_error helper); broker.py denials (policy hook, allowlist, pack, kill-switch) upgraded with why+fix; validation.py all ValidationError messages upgraded (type/enum/missing/extra/bounds); real_tools.py path errors upgraded; chat_agent.py unknown-tool upgraded. tests/test_errors.py (7 tests). Arch checker + errors module synced (errors in LOCAL_MODULES).
features.notes: Course L9/L10: error messages must include what + why + how-to-fix so agents self-correct. agent_error(what, why, fix) -> "<what> -- <why> -- <fix>". Grep-friendly for the H07 verification command. Convention is now enforced by the test suite.

features.title: Model-specific harness profiles (context anxiety handling)
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis context-compaction policy adapts per model: aggressive reset for Sonnet-class, compaction for Opus-class.
features.evidence: v0.21.12: hybridagent/context_profile.py (ContextProfile, profile_for); llm.py _maybe_compact now model-aware; tests/test_context_profile.py (9 tests). Profiles: sonnet (16k/reset), opus (32k/compaction), gpt-5 (48k), gemini (40k), qwen (12k/reset), default (24k, backward-compatible). Operator override (PRAXIS_CTX_BUDGET) wins.
features.notes: Course L5: context anxiety is severe on Sonnet-class (needs resets), mild on Opus-class (compaction ok). profile_for(model) matches by substring; unknown models get the backward-compatible default. Recalibrate by running the goal loop (H10) per model and watching the H05 verifier score drop near context limits. PRAXIS_CTX_BUDGET env override wins over the profile so manual tuning is never lost.

features.title: Harness simplification cadence (monthly component removal test)
features.user_visible_behavior: Monthly, one harness component is temporarily disabled and benchmarked; if no degradation it's removed permanently.
features.evidence: v0.21.13: scripts/harness_simplify.py (--baseline, --component); tests/test_harness_simplify.py (4 tests). Env-toggled components: verifier (PRAXIS_VERIFY=0), reflexion (PRAXIS_REFLECT=0), context_compact (PRAXIS_CTX_BUDGET=0). Auto-logs results to docs/harness/quality-document.md simplification log. Verified: verifier test -> delta 0, decision REMOVE, row appended.
features.notes: Course L12: harness rots like code. Monthly cadence: disable one component, compare eval vs baseline, remove if no degradation. The script automates the compare-and-decide + quality-doc logging. As models improve, run this to find overhead constraints. The verifier test showed delta 0 on the deterministic eval suite (the LLM critic path is not exercised by praxis eval); a real-provider run would be the meaningful test.

features.title: Loop engineering maturity ladder documented (Level 1 -> 5)
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis's autonomous loop capabilities (cron, daemon, subagents, fanout, A2A) are documented as the six loop primitives with a maturity progression.
features.verification: grep -q 'Loop engineering\|six primitives\|maturity ladder' docs/harness/*.md AGENTS.md
features.evidence: v0.21.11: hybridagent/goal_runner.py (GoalRunner, Level 1); praxis goal CLI command; tests/test_goal_runner.py (6 tests). docs/harness/loop-engineering.md (six primitives + maturity ladder 0-5). Four silent costs guarded by construction. Verified end-to-end: praxis goal "list todays events" stopped=approved in 1 turn.
features.notes: Loop engineering builds one floor above the harness (course L13). Level 1 Goal Runner: loop agent.handle until H05 verifier confirms done (threshold 0.3) or max_turns (default 8). Held actions block the loop (never auto-approve unless --approve-all). to_record() is the anti-comprehension-rot log. Level 2 (scheduled) is a thin cron wrapper. Level 3 (multi-agent) needs PPT best-of-N deferred from H05. Level 4-5 future.

features.title: Phase 0 architecture baseline and versioned API contract
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis exposes a backward-compatible, versioned /api/v1 contract with stable envelopes, authenticated remote access, pagination, validators, durable idempotency, and explicit architecture decisions.
features.verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_api_contract.py tests/test_workboard.py tests/test_architecture.py -q && python3 scripts/check_architecture.py
features.evidence: v0.22.0: five accepted ADRs; docs/api-v1.md; hybridagent/api_contract.py; authenticated v1 routes; signed snapshot-bound cursors; conditional ETags; stable error envelopes; bounded durable SQLite idempotency receipts. Verified: API contract 21/21; full pytest; evals 40/40; ruff; mypy 91 modules; architecture checks; clean wheel install. Independent maker-checker PASS, including 8 OS processes against one SQLite DB: 1 create, 7 replays, 0 conflicts/errors, one card; rollback and fingerprint-conflict behavior verified.

features.title: Phase 1 organizations, identity and professional access control
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis isolates organizations and members, authenticates professional users with revocable secure sessions, enforces role/attribute/purpose policy, and governs classified data retention and egress.
features.verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_organizations.py tests/test_authn.py tests/test_authz.py tests/test_data_policy.py tests/test_architecture.py -q && python3 scripts/check_architecture.py
features.evidence: v0.23.0: tenant-owned organizations/users/memberships/teams, opaque hash-only revocable sessions with CSRF, deny-by-default RBAC/ABAC/purpose controls, authenticated approval actor+role, tenant-owned board cards and approvals, tenant-scoped idempotency/deduplication, durable break-glass audit, and classified retention/export/egress policy. Verified: focused Phase 1/API/persistence/architecture tests; complete non-fuzz pytest; evals 40/40; ruff; mypy 95 modules; architecture checks; demo; wheel/sdist and clean-venv import. Independent adversarial maker-checker PASS after reproducing two-tenant board isolation, reviewer denial, cross-tenant approval 404, tenant idempotency separation, egress fail-closed, durable break glass, disabled-principal denial, and distinct cross-tenant approval deduplication.

features.title: Phase 2 professional workspaces and context isolation
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis provides tenant-owned professional workspaces, immutable timelines, isolated context boundaries, and controlled external collaboration rooms.
features.verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_workspaces.py tests/test_workspace_timeline.py tests/test_workspace_isolation.py tests/test_external_rooms.py tests/test_architecture.py -q && python3 scripts/check_architecture.py
features.evidence: v0.24.0: tenant-owned professional workspaces; parties, reviewed deadlines, and SQLite-enforced append-only timelines; workspace-scoped memory/RAG/runs/traces/board/context keys; authenticated workspace/list/create, board, timeline, and external-room v1 routes; owned-record quarantine from legacy routes; controlled external rooms with active-principal RBAC and authoritative item ownership; bounded stable v1 JSON errors; atomic organization+workspace idempotency and BEGIN IMMEDIATE run ownership. Verified: complete non-fuzz suite, evals 40/40, governed demo, Ruff, mypy 99 modules, architecture, package/clean-venv import. Independent PASS deleg_8c417aea reproduced 10 synchronized two-process rounds with one creator/one rejection, correct persisted owner, rollback reuse, and same-workspace idempotence.

features.title: Phase 3 authority, evidence, claims and chain of custody
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis preserves canonical source versions, exact extraction lineage, append-only custody, claim support state, and applicable authority policy within tenant-owned workspaces.
features.verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_evidence.py tests/test_extraction_lineage.py tests/test_custody.py tests/test_claims.py tests/test_authority.py tests/test_architecture.py -q && python3 scripts/check_architecture.py
features.evidence: v0.25.20: canonical immutable sources/versions, exact extraction lineage, append-only hash-chained custody, material-claim release blocking, applicability-first authority policy, and ingestion/media/verifier wiring. Scoped professional output is atomically buffered across revisions and fails closed on readiness, generator, verifier, critic-protocol, terminal, malformed-contract, subclass, and repeated-read paths. Complete non-fuzz suite; 134 focused contracts plus one expected skip; evals 40/40; demo; Ruff; mypy 117 modules; architecture; build; clean-wheel import all passed. Independent maker-checker PASS on exact commit ea090056c3515c7650024a0ce9e480dfef42801e.

features.title: Phase 4 durable professional workflows
features.user_visible_behavior: Praxis provides durable resumable workflow runs, JSON-safe checkpoints, typed interrupts and effect receipts, role-bound professional reviews, and a structured research supervisor.
features.verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_approval_resume_fixes.py tests/test_checkpoints.py tests/test_goal_runner.py tests/test_plan_execute.py tests/test_reviews.py tests/test_research_run.py tests/test_architecture.py -q && python3 scripts/check_architecture.py
features.evidence: v0.26.10 remediation candidate: durable progress overrides restart-supplied steps; held crash recovery recreates interrupts; replan generations and budget persist; consequential steps are not durably running before execution intent; receipt reconstruction requires the exact effect fingerprint; daemon task approvals atomically append distinct signatures, evaluate the persisted threshold, resolve, and claim exact task-bound actions before provider execution. Task approvals never deduplicate across tasks; exact PlanExecutor and chat one-shot grants bind to exact arguments and are consumed once; CLI approval uses the daemon receipt path; legacy 0.26.6 waiting approvals are backfilled exactly or failed closed without an orphan approval. Store-backed kill checks refresh durable state across workers, and durable actions bind the immutable held risk contract. Approval creation is insert-only; SQLite enforces exact signer-object JSON, positive thresholds, non-empty distinct dual signers, finite timestamps, threshold satisfaction, immutable resolved decisions including identity/deletion, immutable action identity, and immutable receipts. Local gates: 1,208 non-fuzz passed with 17 expected skips; 11 fuzz; 126 PP40; 1,219 total with 17 expected skips at 81.79% coverage; 40/40 evals; lint/types/architecture/demo/populated v0.25.20, real v0.26.6, and fail-closed rejected-v0.26.9 migrations/artifacts/install/Docker/security/concurrency stress pass. Exact-head independent review and publication remain pending. Optional mutation baseline remains 58.4% survivors, identical to remote main and non-gating.
